sections.passage_or_context: Type of event – Dragon Boat Race

sections.instruction: Complete the notes/table/flow chart below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Choose the correct letter A, B or C / Choose your answer from the list / Circle TWO letters A-F.

questions.content: The professor says that super highways
options: B are a feature of wealthy cities
C result in more city suburbs
A like the advantages of the suburbs
B rarely go into the city for entertainment
C enjoy living in the city

questions.content: The professor suggests that in five years’ time
options: A City Link will be choked by traffic
B public transport will be more popular
C roads will cost ten times more to build
A encourage a higher standard of driving
B result in lower levels of pollution
C discourage the use of old cars

questions.content: Which TWO facts are mentioned about Copenhagen?
options: B 30% of citizens walk to work
D annual reduction of parking spots

questions.content: Which TWO reasons are given for the low popularity of public transport?
options: B low use means reduced service
